title: Japanese Erotica: Five Films on Love and Sex from the Japanese Underground of the Experimental Cinema
director: Takahiko Iimura, Katsuhiro Tomita, Nobuhiko Ôbayashi
plot: A program of five films on love and sex from the Japanese underground of the experimental cinema, assembled by avant-garde cineaste Takahiko Iimura, and shown at the American Cinematheque from January 19 to 25, 1967.
